title: Intraperitoneal Insulin Tolerance Test Protocol
author: Henri Brunengraber
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.yefftbn

steps.title: Fast mice for overnight or for 6 hours
steps.instruction: Fast mice for overnight or for 6 hours. Remove mouse from cage and put into a clean cage with water and no food.

steps.title: Label the mice using a marker...
steps.instruction: Label the mice using a marker on their tail to quickly tell them apart

steps.title: Weigh each mouse and record weight
steps.instruction: Weigh each mouse and record weight. Calculate the amount of insulin needed for 0.75U to 1.0 U /kg body weight. Record the volume for each mouse.

steps.title: Dilute the stock of insulin (100U/ml) to 0
steps.instruction: Dilute the stock of insulin (100U/ml) to 0.1u/ml

steps.title: Take a glucose reading and record it as time zero
steps.instruction: Take a glucose reading and record it as time zero. Dip tail into clotisol to clot blood.

steps.title: Inject each mouse 3’ apart
steps.instruction: Inject each mouse 3’ apart. Repeat #4 at 15min, 30 min, 60 min after IP injection of insulin.

steps.title: Return mice to cage with food
steps.instruction: Return mice to cage with food.
